module.description: Core OMP schema, bootstrap data, and host-local infrastructure metadata.

apps.description: Host-local OMP deployment agent that can prepare versioned self-upgrades.
Host-local Windows service that starts and supervises OMP worker plugin processes.
Host-local executable used by WorkerManager to run worker plugin artifacts.

integrity.source: Derived from sql/0-validate-openmoduleplatform.sql, sql/1-setup-openmoduleplatform.sql, and sql/2-initialize-openmoduleplatform.sql.

requiredTables.name: ModuleInstances
requiredTables.purpose: Module instances inside an OMP instance.

requiredTables.name: ArtifactConfigurationFiles
requiredTables.purpose: Mutable config files generated beside artifacts.

requiredTables.name: HostConfigurationDocuments
requiredTables.purpose: Imported host-level configuration inputs used to generate host-specific overlays.

requiredTables.name: ConfigOverlayConfigurationFiles
requiredTables.purpose: Configuration files applied by matching host-specific overlays.

requiredTables.name: HostResourceSamples
requiredTables.purpose: Bucketed host resource telemetry samples for historical charts.

requiredTables.name: HostResourceLatest
requiredTables.purpose: Latest host resource telemetry values per host and sample key.

requiredTables.name: HostAgentRuntimeStates
requiredTables.purpose: Observed HostAgent services and takeover state per host.

requiredTables.name: HostAgentLeases
requiredTables.purpose: Short active HostAgent lease per host.

requiredTables.name: HostAgentJobs
requiredTables.purpose: Host-specific job queue processed by HostAgent.

requiredTables.name: MaintenanceFindings
requiredTables.purpose: Portal-visible maintenance scan findings and cleanup state.

requiredTables.name: notifications
requiredTables.purpose: Personal OMP user notifications shown in shared navigation.

requiredTables.name: push_event_outbox
requiredTables.purpose: Durable outbox for OMP push/event wake-up notifications.

requiredTables.name: banners
requiredTables.purpose: System-controlled banners shown in shared navigation.

requiredTables.name: banner_targets
requiredTables.purpose: Global and role targets for system-controlled banners.

roles.name: PortalAdmins
roles.description: Administrative bootstrap role for OMP modules and portal.

roles.name: Everyone
roles.description: Built-in baseline role available to every signed-in OMP principal.

roles.name: AuthenticatedUsers
roles.description: Built-in baseline role for authenticated OMP users.

bootstrapRequirements.name: PortalAdmins principal
bootstrapRequirements.description: At least one environment-specific ADUser or ADGroup principal must be bound to PortalAdmins during bootstrap.

excludedSeedData.reason: The seeded sample host is a local bootstrap placeholder. Production/test installations should replace it with real host rows instead of treating sample-host as an integrity requirement.
Default branding values are only inserted when no installation-specific value exists and must not overwrite customer configuration during repair.
